category_sources: source_facts.description: CP/M emulator for cross-compiling and CP/M tools; official homepage describes CP/M 2/3 emulator for Unix.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and heading use ZXCC; source_facts.name is zxcc.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best documentation surface found and includes intro, download, and usage context.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage provides release tarballs but no official source-control repository link found.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official homepage says ZXCC runs Hi-Tech C and CP/M build tools under Unix/DOS.
